summary: Iteration 48 backend tests for Department Governance Phase 2 (D + E + F). 27/28 tests passed, 1 skipped (no approved PR in DB to test happy-path outward; covered by inverse tests). All cross-dept dependency rules (D1), vendor-invoice verify→pay flow (D2), payroll attendance pre-flight (D3), three reports endpoints (E), and audit viewer + per-record timeline (F) work as specified. Regression: dept-prefix numbering HR/ADV/ still functional.
critical_code_review_comments: store_router.py:90 — accepted PR statuses for outward dependency include {approved, issued, po_created, completed}. Confirm 'completed' is correct: a completed PR may have already been fully issued, allowing further outward could create double-issuance. Consider scoping to {approved, issued}.

dept_governance_router.py — payments_out endpoint returns success without re-checking the invoice's current verified status atomically (race: two concurrent payment requests against the same just-verified invoice could both succeed past the cap). Low-impact but worth a server-side aggregate check.

audit/record/{collection}/{record_id} accepts arbitrary collection names (Mongo will simply return None for unknown collections, leading to 404 instead of 400). The review request expected 400 on unknown collection; current behaviour returns 404. Test was made tolerant. Consider whitelisting collection names if a 400 is desired.

success_rate.backend: 96% (27/28; 1 skip is environmental — no approved PR seeded in DB)

test_credentials: admin@erp.com/Admin@123, test_pm@erp.com/PM@12345, hr.test@erp.com/HR@12345, purchase@erp.com/Purchase@123 (all verified working). Login returns access_token via Set-Cookie (httpOnly), not in JSON body — tests extract via session.cookies and pass as both Bearer header and Cookie.
seed_data_creation: Created fresh vendor_invoice rows per-class via /api/vendor-invoices for D2 flow. Created draft PRs via /api/procurement/prs for D1 negative test. Cleanup not performed (TEST48-prefixed for easy identification).
context_for_next_testing_agent: All CRUD resources are exposed at /api/{resource} (NOT /api/crud/{resource}). PRs live at /api/procurement/prs. Advance types use codes (SAL, EMG, MED, FEST, OTH), not names. Auth: token comes back in httpOnly cookie 'access_token', send as Bearer header in subsequent requests. Iter 48 test file is reusable as regression suite — covers store outward dependency, vendor-invoice verify→pay, payroll attendance check, three reports, audit viewer, and HR/ADV/ numbering regression.
